output.code:
# Read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-RHopvLLjZajUZyom59gzcE-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    raw_bytes = f.read()
raw = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
print("File length (chars):", len(raw))
print("Preview:\n", raw[:1000])

candidates = [
 "وَمَا كُنتُمْ تُخْفُونَ أَن يُبْدى لِلرَّسولِ مِنْ أَصَابَ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْكُمْ أَوْ أَنتُمْ أَصَحُّ لَهُ بِهِ",
 "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِعِيسَى عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ",
 "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِسيدنا مُحَمَدٍ عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ",
 "وَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَزِحُونَ",
 "لا عِلْمَ لِأَحَدٍ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
]

results = []
for cand in candidates:
    start = 0
    found_positions = []
    while True:
        idx = raw.find(cand, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        found_positions.append(idx)
        start = idx + 1
    results.append((cand, found_positions))
results

citations = []
for cand, positions in results:
    # Determine type: cand is an Aya if it's in 1st or 4th or maybe check if it's phrase from list
    # We'll map by matching to known list indices
    if cand in [results[0][0], results[3][0]]: # first and fourth are Ayat
        ctype = "Aya"
    else:
        ctype = "Hadeeth"
    for pos in positions:
        start = pos
        end = pos + len(cand)
        assert raw[start:end] == cand, f"Mismatch for cand at {start}:{end}"
        citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": cand, "citation_type": ctype})

citations
